hyperedges.label: Dashboard KPI card group — dashboard_page renders all 4 KPI cards using shared income/expense data and displayCurrency
Auth flow — dashboard_layout wraps all routes with AuthGuard which relies on JWT stored in localStorage (fetchWithAuth refreshes on 401)
Truck cost pipeline — camion_costos_page uses use_truck_costs hook + CostTable component + AddCostModal to manage annual fixed/variable cost tracking
Expense CRUD data flow: ExpensePage orchestrates AddExpenseForm, EditExpenseForm, DataTable, and columns, all sharing the Expense type and calling fetchWithAuth
Income CRUD data flow: IncomePage orchestrates AddIncomeForm, EditIncomeForm, DataTable, and columns, all sharing the Income type and calling fetchWithAuth
TripDetailPage composes AddIncomeForm, AddExpenseForm, and EditTripForm to allow inline creation of incomes, expenses, and editing of the trip, all connected via tripId and defaultTruckId
Authentication flow: login stores tokens, AuthGuard checks tokens, GuestGuard redirects authenticated users, NavUser clears tokens on logout
Currency display chain: useCurrency provides displayCurrency -> formatCurrency/formatCurrency2 formats values -> displayed in CostPerKmCard, FuelEfficiencyCard, NetBalanceCard, CostTable
Cost management components: AddCostModal and AddFixedCostModal create costs via /api/costs/templates, /api/costs/entries, /api/costs/installments; CostTable displays and edits them via useTruckCosts
Components built on top of Base UI React primitives
Sidebar component composes Sheet, Input, Separator, Skeleton, Tooltip, Button, and useIsMobile hook
DatePicker composes Popover, Calendar, and Button for month-based date selection (locale es)
Multi-currency display system: context + format functions + display type
Expense type enum normalization pipeline: string API responses to numeric form values
Truck cost data pipeline: hook fetches costs using API and shapes them into typed rows

nodes.label: Rationale: Multitenant auth — JWT in localStorage, tenantId gating, onboarding flow
nodes.norm_label: rationale: multitenant auth — jwt in localstorage, tenantid gating, onboarding flow

nodes.label: Rationale: Multi-currency display — all values stored in BRL/USD/UYU, user picks display currency, never hardcode formatBRL
nodes.norm_label: rationale: multi-currency display — all values stored in brl/usd/uyu, user picks display currency, never hardcode formatbrl

nodes.label: Rationale: Enum normalization — API returns string enums (Freight, Gasoil, InProgress); must normalise before use as numeric select defaultValues
nodes.norm_label: rationale: enum normalization — api returns string enums (freight, gasoil, inprogress); must normalise before use as numeric select defaultvalues

nodes.label: localStorage auth tokens (accessToken, refreshToken, tenantId, userId, username, email, tenantName, displayCurrency)
nodes.norm_label: localstorage auth tokens (accesstoken, refreshtoken, tenantid, userid, username, email, tenantname, displaycurrency)

nodes.label: SignupForm
behavior: Collects username, email, password, confirm-password via FormData
Validates password match and minimum length (8 chars)
POST /api/auth with username, email, password
On success: toast + redirect to /login after 3s timeout
On error: toast.error with API message or fallback

nodes.label: SiteHeader
behavior: Reads pathname via usePathname to derive page title
Special titles: /trips/[id] -> 'Ver viaje', /camiones/[id] -> 'Detalle de camión'
Default: last segment capitalized, dashes replaced by spaces
Currency selector: buttons for USD, BRL, UYU — highlights active, calls setDisplayCurrency
DatePicker bound to selectedDate from DateFilterContext

nodes.label: TotalExpenseCard
behavior: Displays total expenses formatted with formatCurrency(total, displayCurrency)
Variation badge: positive >= 0 -> red-500, negative -> green-500 (inverse of income logic)
Shows '+X% vs mes anterior' or '-X% vs mes anterior'

nodes.label: TotalIncomeCard
behavior: Displays total incomes formatted with formatCurrency(total, displayCurrency)
Variation badge: positive >= 0 -> green-500, negative -> red-500
Shows '+X% vs mes anterior' or '-X% vs mes anterior'

nodes.label: TruckForm
behavior: React Hook Form + Zod resolver
toOptionalNumber helper converts empty string to undefined (avoids valueAsNumber NaN issues)
estimatedMonthlyKm field has tooltip: 'Se usa para calcular el costo por km mensual'
currentKm is NOT a field — preserved by PUT caller

nodes.label: CTASection
behavior: Landing CTA: 'Empezá a controlar tu flota hoy'
Primary CTA: Link to /signup ('Crear cuenta gratis')
Secondary CTA: mailto:demo@mileoexpress.com ('Solicitar una demo')
Support link: mailto:soporte@mileoexpress.com
Uses buttonVariants for styling

nodes.label: FeaturesSection
behavior: Renders 6 feature cards from FEATURES constant
Available features: Gestión de flota, Ingresos y egresos, KPIs por camión
Upcoming (available: false): Viajes y cargas, Parsing de comprobantes con IA, Multi-moneda
Badge: green 'Disponible' or muted 'Próximamente'
dependencies: lucide-react (Truck, ArrowLeftRight, BarChart2, Route, ScanLine, DollarSign)

nodes.label: HeroSection
behavior: DashboardMockup: purely visual, no real data, shows browser chrome with KPIs and bar chart mockup
HeroSection: headline 'Sabé exactamente qué gana cada camión, cada mes.'
Primary CTA: /signup, Secondary CTA: #how-it-works anchor
Badge: 'Plataforma de Analytics para Flotas'
Dark background section: oklch(0.10 0 0)

nodes.label: HowItWorks
behavior: 3 steps: 1) Registrá tu empresa, 2) Cargá tu flota y operaciones, 3) Tomá decisiones con datos reales
Desktop connector line between step icons
Section id: 'how-it-works'

nodes.label: KPISection
behavior: 4 stat cards: +40% visibilidad financiera, 11 categorías de gasto, −3h por semana en admin, 100% multi-empresa
KPI example row: costo/km $0.87, ingreso/km $1.43, margen 39.2%, rendimiento 2.8 km/L
Dark background section: oklch(0.10 0 0)
Section id: 'kpis'

nodes.label: LandingFooter
behavior: Footer sections: Producto (#features, #how-it-works, #kpis), Acceso (/login, /signup), Soporte (mailto:soporte@mileoexpress.com)
Brand: Mileo Express logo + Truck icon
Copyright: '© 2025 Mileo Express. Todos los derechos reservados.'

nodes.label: LandingNav
behavior: Sticky top navbar with backdrop blur
Nav links: Características (#features), Cómo funciona (#how-it-works), Métricas (#kpis)
Desktop CTAs: 'Iniciar sesión' (/login, ghost), 'Crear cuenta' (/signup)
Mobile hamburger: Menu/X icon toggle, slides open nav with CTAs
Mobile CTA: 'Crear cuenta gratis'

nodes.label: ProblemSection
behavior: 3 problem cards with destructive icon styling
Problems: planillas de cálculo, camiones sin datos de rentabilidad, comprobantes perdidos
Section heading: 'Gestionar una flota sin datos es operar a ciegas'

nodes.label: AlertDialog (UI)
behavior: Wraps @base-ui/react/alert-dialog primitives
AlertDialogContent: size prop ('default'|'sm'), renders inside Portal + Overlay
AlertDialogAction: wraps Button
AlertDialogCancel: renders Close with Button (variant outline by default)
Animations: fade-in/out, zoom-in/out via data-open/data-closed attributes

nodes.label: Avatar (UI)
behavior: Wraps @base-ui/react/avatar primitives
Avatar sizes: 'sm' (size-6), 'default' (size-8), 'lg' (size-10)
AvatarBadge: absolute positioned badge, size-responsive based on parent Avatar size
AvatarGroup: overlapping avatars with -space-x-2 and ring-2

nodes.label: Badge (UI)
behavior: Uses cva + @base-ui/react/use-render for polymorphic rendering
badgeVariants: h-5 rounded-4xl, inline-flex
Default variant: bg-primary text-primary-foreground

nodes.label: Breadcrumb (UI)
behavior: Breadcrumb: nav with aria-label='breadcrumb'
BreadcrumbLink: polymorphic via useRender (default tag: 'a')
BreadcrumbPage: span role='link' aria-disabled='true' aria-current='page'
BreadcrumbSeparator: ChevronRightIcon by default
BreadcrumbEllipsis: MoreHorizontalIcon with sr-only 'More'

nodes.label: buttonVariants (UI)
behavior: Pure cva function — no React component, used by Button and other components
Default: bg-neutral-900 text-white with 3D shadow effect
Destructive: bg-destructive/10 text-destructive (soft red, not solid)
Sizes: default h-8, xs h-6, sm h-7, lg h-9; icon sizes are squares

nodes.label: Button (UI)
behavior: Wraps @base-ui/react/button
Re-exports buttonVariants from button-variants.ts
data-slot='button'

nodes.label: Calendar (UI)
behavior: Wraps react-day-picker DayPicker with shadcn-style class overrides
CalendarDayButton: Button with ghost/icon variant, handles range selection styling
Chevron component: left/right = ChevronLeft/Right, other = ChevronDown
formatMonthDropdown: short month locale string
Range selection: range_start/range_middle/range_end styling with bg-primary

nodes.label: Field UI Component (Field, FieldLabel, FieldError, FieldGroup, FieldSeparator)
nodes.norm_label: field ui component (field, fieldlabel, fielderror, fieldgroup, fieldseparator)

nodes.label: Sidebar UI Component (SidebarProvider, SidebarMenuButton, useSidebar hook)
nodes.norm_label: sidebar ui component (sidebarprovider, sidebarmenubutton, usesidebar hook)

nodes.label: Table UI Component (Table, TableRow, TableCell, etc.)
nodes.norm_label: table ui component (table, tablerow, tablecell, etc.)

nodes.label: ChartContext React context for chart config sharing
nodes.norm_label: chartcontext react context for chart config sharing

nodes.label: SidebarContext React context for sidebar state
nodes.norm_label: sidebarcontext react context for sidebar state

nodes.label: Volvo FH Globetrotter Semi-truck on Highway
nodes.norm_label: volvo fh globetrotter semi-truck on highway

nodes.label: Volvo FH Globetrotter Semi-truck on Forest Road
nodes.norm_label: volvo fh globetrotter semi-truck on forest road

links.source_location: withSentryConfig wraps both client and server
fetchWithAuth calls for truck and cost templates/entries
import type { Expense as ColumnExpense } from egresos/columns
